text: The surgeon demonstrates toggling between the fourth arm and the working arm of the robotic system. The fourth arm is shown holding a ring, and when toggling back to the fourth arm, the surgeon maintains finger approximation to prevent the ring from dropping.

The surgeon demonstrates reactivating the fourth robotic arm by twisting the ender wrist left and right. The needle is held at a forty-five degree angle using the robotic arm, which features an extra wrist joint, allowing for precise manipulation in confined areas such as during anastomosis in the pelvis.
